response.global_analysis: The video contains no vocal audio, only instrumental background music. As per the task priority, I am focusing on transcribing and translating the relevant on-screen text from the informational slides. I have identified key announcements, event guidelines, and merchandise sections. All original Japanese text has been translated into English. No reference lyrics were used as no vocals are present.
